home.onCallHint: Blood banks can ping you for {blood} compatible emergencies within {radius} km.
home.offCallHint: Turn on to receive emergency pings from verified blood banks.
home.noRequests: No active requests near you right now.
alert.declineNote: Declining never affects your credits. {count} compatible donors were pinged.
ontheway.confirmed: You are confirmed as a donor
ontheway.notified: The blood bank has been notified you're coming.
ontheway.tipId: Carry a photo ID (Aadhaar or DL)
ontheway.tipMeal: Eat a proper meal, drink water
ontheway.tipAlcohol: No alcohol in the last 24 hours
credits.title: Credits
credits.subtitle: Your digital replacement card, with no paper to lose.
credits.rule: 100 credits waive 1 replacement unit for you or up to 4 registered family members.
credits.empty: No credit transactions yet. Donate to earn credits!
family.title: Registered family
family.empty: No family members yet. Add up to 4.
family.limit: You can register at most 4 family members.
redeem.title: Redeem 100 credits
redeem.disabledBalance: Need at least 100 credits to redeem.
redeem.disabledActive: You already have an active redemption code.
redeem.showCode: Show this code at the blood bank
redeem.showHint: Staff will scan or type the same RSC code.
console.verifySubtitle: Scan a QR code or enter a code to verify a donation or redeem credits
console.cameraHint: Camera access required for QR scanning. Use manual entry below as fallback.
console.cameraFailed: Camera could not start. Use the code below.
console.donationConfirmed: Donation confirmed · 100 credits sent to donor
console.donationFootnote: Confirmation closes the loop. Donor credits are issued only after bank staff verify the collected unit.
console.redeemFootnote: Redeeming waives one replacement unit for the donor or a registered family member.
login.donorSubtitle: Sign in to answer blood requests nearby
login.restorable: This account is scheduled for deletion. Confirm your password below to restore it within 30 days.
login.accountGone: This account has been permanently deleted and cannot be restored.
login.deletedNotice: Your account is deactivated. You can restore it within 30 days by signing in and choosing Restore.
login.restoreSubtitle: Enter the same phone/email and password to undo deletion within 30 days
dataRights.title: Data Rights Center
dataRights.lede: Review the choices available for your RaktaSetu information and submit a request through the channel that fits your situation.
dataRights.verifyNote: Rights vary by jurisdiction and can have legal exceptions. RaktaSetu must verify the requester's identity before acting on a request submitted by email.
dataRights.accessBody: receive a readable copy of account and activity data associated with your signed-in account.
dataRights.correctionBody: update profile information in the app or ask for help correcting a record you cannot edit.
dataRights.deletionBody: deactivate the account immediately, then anonymize identifiers after 30 days, subject to blood-bank traceability retention.
dataRights.restrictionBody: ask the operator to review whether a particular use should stop or be limited.
dataRights.consentBody: stop optional processing where consent is the applicable legal basis. Withdrawal does not make earlier processing unlawful.
dataRights.complaintBody: contact the relevant privacy or data protection authority when applicable.
dataRights.exportScope: Exports are created for this authenticated account only.
dataRights.consequenceDeactivate: Your account is deactivated immediately and you are signed out of every device.
dataRights.consequenceMatching: You leave donor matching right away (on-call is turned off).
dataRights.consequenceRestore: You can restore the account within 30 days from the sign-in page using your phone/email and password.
dataRights.consequenceRetain: After 30 days, profile identifiers are anonymized. Donation records and credit history stay in anonymized form for blood-bank traceability.
dataRights.consequenceBlockers: Deletion is blocked while you have an active credit redemption or an accepted blood request that is not yet completed — finish or cancel those first.
dataRights.passwordLabel: Current password (required for password accounts; leave blank only for Google-only accounts)
dataRights.exportReady: Your account export has been downloaded to this device.
dataRights.exportFailed: We could not prepare the export. Contact privacy@raktasetu.org for help.
dataRights.deleteBlocked: Finish or cancel your open redemption or accepted request before deleting the account.
dataRights.passwordRequired: Enter your current password to confirm deletion.
dataRights.deleteFailed: Account deletion could not be completed. Contact privacy@raktasetu.org.
dataRights.signInHint: to download your account export or use the authenticated deletion tool. You can also submit a request by email.
dataRights.emailStep1: Email privacy@raktasetu.org from the address associated with your account when possible.
dataRights.emailStep2: State the request type and the account phone or email. Do not send a password, authentication token, government ID number, or medical document.
dataRights.emailStep3: The operator should acknowledge the request, verify identity proportionately, evaluate legal exceptions, and respond within the applicable deadline.
dataRights.emailFootnote: The operating organization must adopt this workflow, monitor the inbox, and document request outcomes. The application provides the entry point but cannot establish those operational procedures by itself.
profile.kannadaNote: ಕನ್ನಡ is on for core donor flows (home, alert, on-the-way, credits, login). Other screens stay English for now.
metrics.title: Pilot metrics
